description_long: This house features a whimsical, fantasy-inspired design with a bulbous, rounded structure and a large, flared roof that resembles a mushroom cap. The exterior walls are textured to mimic stone or stucco, with patches of green moss or grass growing on the roof and upper surfaces, blending the house into its natural surroundings. A prominent, curved chimney extends from the roof, adding to the fantastical appearance. The front entryway is accessed by a short set of steps leading to a recessed door, flanked by decorative stonework and a circular path of stepping stones. Windows are set into the thick walls, with wooden shutters and irregular placements, contributing to the organic, storybook feel. The house sits on a square plot of lush, grassy terrain, with a winding stone path leading up to the entrance.
description: A whimsical, rounded house with a mushroom-like roof, mossy accents, and a curved chimney, set on a grassy plot with a stone path and decorative entryway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway with steps, a recessed door, and a circular path leading up to the house, with the curved chimney visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rounded structure, mossy roof, and two shuttered windows, with the stone path curving around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the bulbous back of the house, the full curve of the chimney, and the circular stone border around the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays additional windows with shutters and the continuation of the stone path, with the entryway partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed door with short steps, circular stone path, and decorative stonework
